overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a dark, abandoned underground subway station with a flashlight. The character examines the environment, interacts with a locker, and descends a long staircase into deeper tunnels.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned subway station waiting area with benches and graffiti

events.description: character enters through metal gate into the subway station interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the abandoned station room, sweeping flashlight across walls and benches

entered.detail: rusted metal security gate that the character just passed through
white ceramic tile walls covering the station interior
wall covered in red and white graffiti tags illuminated by flashlight
old wooden waiting bench against the tiled wall
structural support pillar with blue paint near the base

segments.scene_description: The character enters an abandoned subway station through a metal gate, revealing a dimly lit waiting area with white tiled walls, wooden benches, and extensive graffiti. The flashlight illuminates the decaying interior as the character explores the space.

events.description: character crouches and opens a metal locker to search inside
character closes the locker and stands up

agents.ego_description: approaching the lockers, crouching to open and search inside, then closing it and moving on

entered.detail: tall dark metal storage lockers with multiple compartments
old sign with text indicating direction to platform

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a set of metal lockers in the corner of the station, crouches to open one and search inside with the flashlight, then closes it. A sign pointing to the platform is visible on the wall above.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to tunnel entrance

events.description: character exits the main station room into a narrow connecting corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor toward a gated tunnel entrance

entered.detail: metal security gate at the end of the narrow corridor
close concrete walls creating a tight passageway
painted yellow safety line running along the floor

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the locker area and enters a narrow, darker corridor with a yellow safety line on the floor. The corridor leads to a metal gate at the far end, marking the transition to a deeper tunnel section.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase tunnel with exposed infrastructure

events.description: character enters the long descending tunnel staircase
character continues descending deeper into the tunnel, visibility decreases slightly

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down a long staircase into a dark underground tunnel, flashlight cutting through the haze

entered.detail: curved concrete archway forming the tunnel entrance
metal handrail running along the right side of the staircase
network of pipes and conduits running along the tunnel ceiling
walls covered in various graffiti tags and markings

segments.scene_description: The character descends a long, dimly lit staircase tunnel with a metal railing on the right and exposed pipes overhead. The flashlight beam cuts through the hazy air, revealing graffiti-covered walls as the character moves deeper underground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a decaying subway waiting area down into the oppressive depths of an underground tunnel system. It begins as the character passes through a metal gate into a dimly lit station, where the flashlight beam sweeps across white tiled walls, wooden benches, and layers of graffiti. As the character moves toward the corner to crouch and search through a set of metal lockers, the perspective shifts toward a directional sign pointing the way to the platform. The scene then transitions into a narrow, darker corridor marked by a yellow safety line on the floor, leading the camera toward another metal gate. Finally, the path opens into a long, descending staircase tunnel where the flashlight cuts through hazy air and illuminates exposed overhead pipes and graffiti-covered walls as the character sinks deeper underground.
